sectionHeadings: 003 - Multi-driver auth service: Encore authHandler/Gateway, mock/rauthy OIDC SSO, JWT issuance and refresh rotation
record.summary: The auth service: a dual-mode Encore authHandler (httpOnly session cookie + Bearer), a Gateway binding it, two SSO drivers (mock, rauthy OIDC) selected by AUTH_DRIVER, RS256 JWT issuance, refresh-token rotation and revocation, CSRF protection, rate limiting, and auth-event audit.
record.title: Multi-driver auth service: Encore authHandler/Gateway, mock/rauthy OIDC SSO, JWT issuance and refresh rotation
